B1200_CRCTV_LENS_CD B1200 Corrective Lenses Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies whether or not the resident utilizes corrective lenses. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank(skip pattern)
94 C0100_CNDCT_MENTL_STUS_CD C0100_CNDCT_MENTL_STUS_CD C0100 Brief Interview for Mental Status Be Conducted Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies whether or not a Brief Interview for Mental Status (BIMS) should be
performed. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank(skip
